themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 10 verses. Commentary leans on "Aaron's first official sacrifices as high priest, culminating in God's glory appearing and fi...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַֽיִּקְרְבוּ֙: drew near - to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose".

themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses.
